parameters.content:
## 🎂 Birthday & Anniversary Reminder with AI Gift Ideas

### How it works
1. Runs daily at 8:00 AM (configurable schedule).
2. Reads a list of people (name, birthday, role, interests) from Google Sheets.
3. Checks which birthdays or anniversaries are coming up in the next 7 days.
4. Uses Groq AI (free) to generate 3 personalized gift suggestions per person.
5. Sends a beautifully formatted reminder with gift ideas to your Telegram.

### Setup steps
- [ ] Create a Google Sheet with columns: `name`, `birthday` (DD/MM), `role`, `interests`
- [ ] Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather and get your chat ID from @userinfobot
- [ ] Get a free Groq API key at [console.groq.com](https://console.groq.com)
- [ ] Add Groq as an OpenAI credential with base URL `https://api.groq.com/openai/v1`
- [ ] Connect Google Sheets and Telegram credentials to the workflow nodes

### Customization
- Change the schedule in the trigger node (default: daily 8 AM)
- Adjust the lookahead window (default: 7 days) in the Check Dates code node
- Modify the AI prompt to change gift suggestion style or add budget constraints

## Step 1: Read Data

Reads your people list from Google Sheets.
Required columns: `name`, `birthday` (DD/MM), `relationship`, `interests`

## Step 2: Check Dates

Compares each person's birthday against today.
Only events **today** or **in 7 days** pass through.

## Step 3: AI Gift Ideas (Groq — Free)

Uses Groq LLM to generate a warm birthday message + 3 personalized gift suggestions based on the person's interests. Free at console.groq.com

## Step 4: Send Telegram

Sends formatted message with birthday info + AI gift ideas. Create a bot via @BotFather, get your chat ID via @userinfobot.
